mapper.sql: id, template_code, template_name, module_type, description, current_version, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tpl_template WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM tpl_template WHERE template_code = #{templateCode} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tpl_template ( template_code, template_name, module_type, description, current_version, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{templateCode}, #{templateName}, #{moduleType}, #{description}, #{currentVersion}, #{status}, #{createBy}, NOW(), #{updateBy}, NOW(), 0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE tpl_template
update_time = NOW(), update_by = #{updateBy}, template_name = #{templateName}, module_type = #{moduleType}, description = #{description}, current_version = #{currentVersion}, status = #{status},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
